title: Product Suspended Event v1
description: Published when Product Activation is suspended or blocked. Suspension does not directly edit inventory or sellable truth.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Product Activation guard; PACK-01 Sellable Gate dependency. TODO: source documents do not define a separate Product Suspended schema; Product Activation status is used as the bounded contract.

eventType.description: Stable event type including source, domain, name, and v1 suffix.

source.description: System that owns and emits this event.

causationId.description: Optional parent command, event, or workflow identifier.

idempotencyKey.description: Required when emitted from retryable or high-risk command; optional for derived read-model notifications.
